# @datasynx/agentic-ai-cartography

> MCP-first infrastructure & agentic-AI cartography — install once, every AI agent knows your system landscape. Read-only discovery exposed over the Model Context Protocol.

Cartography discovers your services, databases, SaaS tools and dependencies
(read-only, deterministic) and exposes the topology over the Model Context
Protocol. Install once and any MCP host or agent framework can query it.

## Tutorials

- [Get started](https://datasynx.github.io/agentic-ai-cartography/tutorials/): From zero to an agent that knows your system.

## How-to guides

- [Install into a client](https://datasynx.github.io/agentic-ai-cartography/how-to/install): Write the MCP config for any supported host.
- [Non-MCP frameworks](https://datasynx.github.io/agentic-ai-cartography/adapters): LangGraph, CrewAI, Vercel AI SDK and more.

## Reference

- [MCP tools & resources](https://datasynx.github.io/agentic-ai-cartography/reference/mcp): Resources, tools and prompts the server exposes.
- [CLI](https://datasynx.github.io/agentic-ai-cartography/reference/cli): datasynx-cartography commands and flags.
- [Supported clients](https://datasynx.github.io/agentic-ai-cartography/reference/clients): The host install matrix.

## Explanation

- [Why MCP-first](https://datasynx.github.io/agentic-ai-cartography/explanation/): The design rationale.
